title: The Seven Cs of Communication
author: From: Effective Business Communication
content: Communication should be Clear, Concise, Concrete, Correct, Coherent, Complete, and Courteous.

title: Active Listening
author: From: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People
content: Seek first to understand, then to be understood. Listening is an active, not passive, process.

title: High-Context vs. Low-Context
author: From: The Culture Map
content: High-context cultures rely on nuance and implicit messages; low-context cultures prioritize explicit, detailed communication.

title: The Feedback Loop
author: From: Radical Candor
content: Effective feedback provides both direct challenge and personal care, balancing honesty with supportive intent.

title: Non-Violent Communication
author: From: Nonviolent Communication
content: Observing without evaluating, expressing feelings, identifying needs, and making actionable requests.
